title: Every Time Period Status Update

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there not a way to have a status updated using the “every time period” option? There are only a few actions available for this automation and none are to update a status, which seems like the most obvious choice. Currently, I have a date column and a status column. When the date arrives, the automation updates the status and changes the date to a new date I have specified in the automation. It would be much simpler if the “every time period” automation included updating a status column.
